title: Continuous Clearing Auction with Kite Liu | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
Kite Liu, Research Scientist at Uniswap Labs, introduces the Continuous Clearing Auction (CCA).

The session explores the mechanism’s design and economic intuition, and shows how the CCA enables fair, permissionless token launches with smooth price discovery and seamless integration with Uniswap v4.
